◎译　　名　动物世界 / Animal Kingdom
◎片　　名　Animal World
◎年　　代　1968
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　1968-06-16(美国) / 1981-12-31(中国大陆)
◎IMDb评分  7.8/10 from 39 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0062540/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/4296165/
◎片　　长　50分钟
◎导　　演　弗雷德·R·克鲁格 Fred R. Krug / 拉尔夫·B·怀特 Ralph B. White / 米拉斯·C·欣肖 Milas C. Hinshaw
◎主　　演　比尔·伯鲁德 Bill Burrud
　　　　　  比尔·鲍德温 Bill Baldwin
　　　　　  赵忠祥 Zhongxiang Zhao


◎简　　介  

　　Hosted by veteran wildlife film-maker Bill Burrud, this series provided viewers with an up-close look at the lives of wild animals from all over the world in their natural habitats. Originally released as "Animal Kingdom", this series bounced between all three of the major networks during its three years in prime-time.
